---
title: "Maddie Watson"
subtitle: "Summer Research Intern"
image: /images/portraits/maddie-watson.jpg
role: alumni
aliases: ["Maddie Watson", "M. Watson", "M Watson", "Madeleine Watson"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:miw34@cornell.edu"
---

I am an undergraduate student on the Cornell Gymnastics team majoring in
environment and sustainability. I am interested in how terrestrial lidar
scanners can answer important questions for forest ecology and sustainability.
